esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-tomcat.otel-*
| WHERE Catalina_GlobalRequestProcessor_errorCount IS NOT NULL
    AND Catalina_GlobalRequestProcessor_requestCount IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    max_errors = MAX(Catalina_GlobalRequestProcessor_errorCount),
    min_errors = MIN(Catalina_GlobalRequestProcessor_errorCount),
    max_requests = MAX(Catalina_GlobalRequestProcessor_requestCount),
    min_requests = MIN(Catalina_GlobalRequestProcessor_requestCount)
  BY host.name, attributes.name
| EVAL
    delta_errors = max_errors - min_errors,
    delta_requests = max_requests - min_requests
// Minimum request volume to avoid noisy alerts on low-traffic connectors
// Adjust this threshold based on expected traffic volume
| WHERE delta_requests > 10
| EVAL error_rate_pct = ROUND(delta_errors / delta_requests * 100.0, 2)
// Alert threshold — adjust based on acceptable error rate for your services
| WHERE error_rate_pct > 5.0
| SORT error_rate_pct DESC
